item.title: Privacy Policy
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we are

Suggested text: Our website address is: http://local.blueraevenfarmstand.com.

Comments

Suggested text: When visitors leave comments on the site we collect the data shown in the comments form, and also the visitor’s IP address and browser user agent string to help spam detection.

An anonymized string created from your email address (also called a hash) may be provided to the Gravatar service to see if you are using it. The Gravatar service privacy policy is available here: https://automattic.com/privacy/. After approval of your comment, your profile picture is visible to the public in the context of your comment.

Media

Suggested text: If you upload images to the website, you should avoid uploading images with embedded location data (EXIF GPS) included. Visitors to the website can download and extract any location data from images on the website.

Cookies

Suggested text: If you leave a comment on our site you may opt-in to saving your name, email address and website in cookies. These are for your convenience so that you do not have to fill in your details again when you leave another comment. These cookies will last for one year.

If you visit our login page, we will set a temporary cookie to determine if your browser accepts cookies. This cookie contains no personal data and is discarded when you close your browser.

When you log in, we will also set up several cookies to save your login information and your screen display choices. Login cookies last for two days, and screen options cookies last for a year. If you select "Remember Me", your login will persist for two weeks. If you log out of your account, the login cookies will be removed.

If you edit or publish an article, an additional cookie will be saved in your browser. This cookie includes no personal data and simply indicates the post ID of the article you just edited. It expires after 1 day.

Embedded content from other websites

Suggested text: Articles on this site may include embedded content (e.g. videos, images, articles, etc.). Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor has visited the other website.

These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracking your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website.

Who we share your data with

Suggested text: If you request a password reset, your IP address will be included in the reset email.

How long we retain your data

Suggested text: If you leave a comment, the comment and its metadata are retained indefinitely. This is so we can recognize and approve any follow-up comments automatically instead of holding them in a moderation queue.

For users that register on our website (if any), we also store the personal information they provide in their user profile. All users can see, edit, or delete their personal information at any time (except they cannot change their username). Website administrators can also see and edit that information.

What rights you have over your data

Suggested text: If you have an account on this site, or have left comments, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you, including any data you have provided to us. You can also request that we erase any personal data we hold about you. This does not include any data we are obliged to keep for administrative, legal, or security purposes.

Where your data is sent

Suggested text: Visitor comments may be checked through an automated spam detection service.

item.title: Home
item.content:encoded:
Oregon Family Farm

Blue Raeven

because great pie begins with great fruit.

From our family farm to your table — handcrafted pies made with Oregon's finest fruit, baked with heritage and served with love.

Explore Our Products
Visit the Farm Stand

Farm Fresh Fruit

Picked at peak ripeness from our own Oregon fields.

Handcrafted Pies

Small-batch baked daily with time-honored family recipes.

Family Heritage

Generations of farming tradition in every bite.

Local Farm Stand

A welcoming stop for fresh fruit, pies, and community.

Rooted in Oregon Soil

What began as a family passion for growing the finest berries in Oregon's Willamette Valley has blossomed into something truly special. Blue Raeven is more than a farm — it's a gathering place where the land, the fruit, and the community come together.

Every pie we bake starts in our fields. We grow the berries, pick them at their peak, and craft each pie by hand using recipes passed down through generations.

Read Our Story

From Our Ovens

Signature Products

Reminiscent of the good ol' days

View All Products

"The best pie I've ever had. You can taste the love and care that goes into every bite. Blue Raeven is a true Oregon treasure."

— Sarah M., Portland

Visit Our Farm Stand

Stop by for fresh-baked pies, seasonal fruit, jams, and more. We're located in the heart of Oregon wine country, just a short drive from Portland.

Plan Your Visit
Contact Us

item.title: Our Story
item.content:encoded:
Our Story

Three generations of Oregon farming

From Our Fields to Your Table

Blue Raeven Farm sits on 40 acres of rich Willamette Valley soil, where the maritime climate and volcanic earth create perfect conditions for growing berries. What started as a small family farm in the 1970s has grown into a beloved destination for pie lovers across Oregon.

Our founder, Robert "Bob" Raeven, had a simple philosophy: grow the best fruit possible, and the rest will follow. Today, his grandchildren continue that tradition, tending the same berry patches and using the same time-honored recipes that made Blue Raeven famous.

Every pie we make starts right here on the farm. We pick berries at the peak of ripeness, often baking them into pies the very same day. There's no factory, no shipping department—just a family kitchen where each pie is crafted by hand with care and love.

"We don't just make pies—we share a piece of our family with everyone who takes a bite."

— The Raeven Family

Our Values

Quality First

We never compromise on ingredients. Only the freshest, ripest berries make it into our pies.

Sustainable Farming

We care for the land that sustains us, using responsible practices that protect Oregon's natural beauty.

Community Connection

Blue Raeven is a gathering place where neighbors become friends over a slice of pie.

item.title: Our Products
item.content:encoded:
Our Products

Fresh-baked with Oregon's finest

Every product is made with fresh fruit from our farm and baked with love. Availability varies by season—call ahead for today's selection.

No products available at this time. Please check back soon!

Want to reserve a pie? Call us at (503) 835-0740 or stop by the farm stand!

item.title: Visit the Farm Stand
item.content:encoded:
Visit the Farm Stand

A taste of Oregon wine country

Plan Your Visit

Our farm stand is nestled in the heart of Oregon wine country, just 45 minutes from Portland. Stop by for fresh-baked pies, seasonal fruit, artisan jams, and a warm welcome from our family.

Location

20255 SW Hillsboro Highway
Amity, OR 97101

Hours

Thursday – Sunday: 10am – 5pm
Monday – Wednesday: Closed
Seasonal hours may apply

Contact

Phone: (503) 835-0740
Email: hello@blueraeven.com

What to Expect

Fresh-Baked Pies

Our signature marionberry, seasonal fruit pies, and classic favorites—baked fresh daily.

Seasonal Fruit

U-pick berries in summer, fresh produce, and orchard fruits when in season.

Jams & Preserves

Small-batch jams, jellies, and syrups made from our farm-grown berries.

item.title: Contact
item.content:encoded:
Contact Us

We'd love to hear from you

Get in Touch

Have a question about our pies? Want to place a special order? Planning a visit? We're here to help!

Phone

(503) 835-0740

Email

hello@blueraeven.com

Address

Blue Raeven Farm & Pie Stand
20255 SW Hillsboro Highway
Amity, OR 97101

Follow Us

Hours of Operation

Thursday – Sunday: 10am – 5pm
Monday – Wednesday: Closed

Seasonal hours may vary. Call ahead during holidays.

Special Orders

Planning an event or need multiple pies? We're happy to accommodate special orders with advance notice. Call us at least 48 hours ahead for large orders.

Wholesale Inquiries

Interested in carrying Blue Raeven products? Contact us to discuss wholesale partnerships.

item.title: Marionberry Pie
item.excerpt:encoded: Oregon's signature berry in a flaky, golden crust. Our most beloved pie.

item.title: Triple Berry Pie
item.excerpt:encoded: A harmonious blend of marionberries, blueberries, and raspberries.

item.title: Blueberry Crumble
item.excerpt:encoded: Sweet blueberries topped with a buttery oat crumble.

item.title: Strawberry Rhubarb Pie
item.excerpt:encoded: The perfect balance of sweet strawberries and tart rhubarb.

item.title: Apple Crumble Pie
item.excerpt:encoded: Classic apple pie with a cinnamon crumble topping.

item.title: Pecan Pie
item.excerpt:encoded: Rich, buttery pecans in a sweet caramel filling.

item.title: Boysenberry Pie
item.excerpt:encoded: A rare Northwest treasure with deep purple berries.

item.title: Marionberry Jam
item.excerpt:encoded: Small-batch jam made with fresh Oregon marionberries.
